generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion of lab-scale gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed for crane operation safety"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time swing angle measurements from Swing Angle Encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, GantrylibPython
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time wind speed measurements from Anemometer"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, GantrylibPython
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Comprehensive crane state data including position, velocity, and environmental factors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, GantrylibPython
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of lab-scale gantry crane system in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation of crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibPython
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for crane dynamics and physical behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibPython
]

instance ArcadiaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Arcadia model for Model-Based Systems Engineering in Capella"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]

instance GantrylibPython : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module (gantrylib) for crane control, trajectory generation, and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, HMI
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing crane state data and historical logs"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization platform for real-time dashboard and status monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MosquittoMQTT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for real-time communication between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deploying digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, VisualizationService, TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, HMI
]

instance Fusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 for CAD modeling and design validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Capella tool for Model-Based Systems Engineering in teaching contexts"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance KiCad : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "KiCad for hardware schematics design of control systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables TMC4671Eval
]

instance TMC4671Eval : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controllers for precise stepper motor control"
    DTDFVocab:enables CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet
]

instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for sensor measurement and physical interface control"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs crane state data to TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time dashboard visualization for operator decisions"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeStatusVisualization
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal crane movement trajectories using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectorySuggestion
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics for validation and training purposes"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real-time measurements against simulations for continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationAlert
]

instance HMI : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Human Machine Interface for operator control of crane system"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperatorControlAction
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling cart movement along crane frame"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at end of hoist for picking up containers"
]

instance ContinuousValidationAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts for threshold breaches in crane operation via dashboard"
]

instance OptimalTrajectorySuggestion : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Suggestions for optimal crane movement trajectories based on kinematic models"
]

instance RealTimeStatusVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane status for operator decisions"
]

instance DataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data logging confirmation and storage status"
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results from simulation against real-time measurements"
]

instance OperatorControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator-controlled actions for manual crane movement and system control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from Trajectory Generator Service and Control Application sent via Physical Crane Interface to motor controllers and electromagnet for physical movement execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization for data logging and validation, with no specific sampling rate specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated as a set of containers on a single PC: Physical Crane hardware connected via Python interface to Control Application, Logging Application, HMI; services (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, continuous validation) interconnected via MQTT and TimescaleDB."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers as-designed (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360) and as-operated phases, with continuous validation and simulation during operational use."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares measured trajectory data against simulation results using distance metrics and thresholds; model validation techniques from [5] applied for verification."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; SQL queries for TimescaleDB access; physical interface via Python to hardware controllers."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on a single personal computer with Docker containers for database, MQTT broker, and dashboard; Python applications installed via pip for other services."
]
